expected_behavior: Adapter MUST parse response status='success' and extract the job ID (42) from result/job.
Adapter MUST record the commit job ID in its audit trail so the caller can poll for job completion.
Adapter MUST treat a successful commit-enqueue as the final step that activates all previously staged config changes.
Adapter MUST expose the job ID in the return value of commit_config() so callers can invoke get_job_status(job_id=42).
Adapter MUST NOT consider the config active until the job status polling confirms the commit completed successfully.

primary_citation.quote: After issuing a commit, the response returns a job ID. Use the job ID with the operational command 'show jobs id <jobid>' to monitor commit progress.

provenance.sanitization: API key replaced with <API-KEY>. Host replaced with pa-test.example.com (synthetic). Job ID 42 is synthetic. No real PAN-OS device or production config captured.
